title: Proclamation No. 416, s. 1957
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 416

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL SITE PURPOSES A CERTAIN PORTION OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN BARRIO BUGASAN (SARAKAN), MUNICIPALITY OF PARANG, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the provisions of section 83 of Commonwealth Act No. 141, as amended, I, Carlos P. Garcia, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from the sale and settlement and reserve for school site purposes under the administration of the Director of Public Schools, subject to private rights, if any there be, ascertain portion of the public domain situated in barrio Bugasan (Sarakan), municipality of Parang, province of Cotabato, island of Mindanao, and more particularly described as follows:

Psu-136866 (Claimed by Datu Bara Lidasan)

A parcel of land (as shown on plan Psu-136866), situated in the barrio of Bugasan, municipality of Parang, province of Cotabato. Bounded on the N., by property of Luis Baiken; on the E., by Sarakan Creek; on the S., by provincial road; and on the W., and NW., by provincial road. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 43° 37′ E., 1,774.80 meters from Triangulation Station, Badac, Pls-27, thence S. 74° 39′ W., 27.24 meters to point 2; thence N. 70° 22′ W., 24.82 meters to point 3; thence N. 29° 52′ W., 20.12 meters to point 4; thence N. 10° 36′ W., 82.59 meters to point 5; thence N. 1° 20′ E., 30.35 meters to point 6; thence N. 23° 55′ E., 21.86 meters to point 7; thence N. 33° 56′ E., 159.99 meters to point 8; thence S. 84° OS’ E-, 33.96 meters to point 9; thence S. 82° 49′ E., 82.99 meters to point 10; thence S. 2° 05′ E., 37.12 meters to point 11; thence S. 9° 41′ W., 18.78 meters to point 12; thence S. 37° 14′ W., 23.01 meters to point 13; thence S. 34° 09′ E., 33.07 meters to point 14; thence S. 66° 44′ E., 20.20 meters to point 15; thence S. 27° 52′ E., 23.02 meters to point 16; thence S, 16° 31′ W., 13.27 meters to point 17; thence S. 37° 11′ W., 55.32 meters to point 18; thence S. 25° 30′ W., 43.14 meters to point 19; thence N. 85° 47’ W. , 40.42 meters to point 20; thence S. 83° 35′ W., 32.79 meters to point 21; thence S. 48° 10′ W., 60.35 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 47,870 square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: Point 9 by old B.L. cylindrical concrete monument; points 11 to 19 inclusive, by stakes; points 20 and 21 by nail in crosses on trees; and the rest, by P.L.S. cylindrical monuments; bearings true; declination 1° 45′ E.; date of survey, November 28, 1952.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 9th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and fifty-seven, and of the Independence of the, Philippines, the eleventh.

CARLOS P. GARCIA President of the Philippines

By the President:

FORTUNATO DE LEON Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
